summary: Iteration 57 — backend + frontend validation of the new TWO-STAGE Allocations workflow (Buying → Warehouse fulfilment). Backend pytest 6/6 PASS via /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_57_alloc_two_stage.py: (1) POST /api/allocations/save returns status='pending_fulfilment', allocated_total mirrors suggested_total initially, and every row carries buying_packs/buying_units/buying_sizes + warehouse_sizes (initially equal to buying_sizes) + warehouse_units. No _id leakage. (2) GET /api/allocations/runs?status=pending_fulfilment returns ONLY pending; ?status=fulfilled returns ONLY fulfilled and excludes the just-saved pending one. (3) PATCH /api/allocations/runs/{id}/fulfil with rows:[{store, sizes:{S:6,M:12,L:10}}] flips status='fulfilled', sums warehouse_units (28+4=32) into allocated_total, sets delta_total = 32 - suggested_total, stamps fulfilled_at + fulfilled_by_email='admin@vivofashiongroup.com'. Per-row warehouse_sizes/warehouse_units/allocated_units/sizes/delta_units all correctly updated; delta_units = warehouse_units - suggested_units. (4) PATCH on already-fulfilled run → HTTP 400. Frontend (admin login on preview, /allocations): Calculate produced result; Card 1 'Suggested allocation' is read-only (0 number inputs inside data-testid='allocation-result' card); Card 2 title contains 'Step 1 · Buying Plan' and exposes 'Send to Warehouse' button (data-testid='alloc-save-run', label='Send to Warehouse'). Clicking it shows the green 'Sent to warehouse · check the Pending Fulfilment queue below' toast and renders the new 'Step 2 · Pending Warehouse Fulfilment' card (data-testid='allocation-pending-queue') at the bottom of the page with a per-run count badge ('2 PENDING' observed). Each pending row shows style_name, color pill, allocation_type pill, store/store-count/sender/timestamp, and right-side 'Buying / Actual' totals. Per-spec data-testid scheme verified: alloc-pending-{run_id}, alloc-pending-confirm-{run_id}, alloc-pending-reset-{run_id}, alloc-pending-size-{run_id}-{store}-{size}, alloc-pending-store-{store}. Pending queue table has Plan/Actual columns per size + 'Actual total' column with row colour-coded vs buying total. Confirm flips the run to fulfilled (verified end-to-end via backend pytest). Recent Allocations table queried in DOM after fulfil: confirmed it has Color column header. Test data cleanup: 4 Iter57_TEST_/ Iter57 runs deleted from allocation_runs.

integration_issues.flow: Allocations · Pending Queue refresh after Send to Warehouse
integration_issues.issue: Same post-save refetch timing flake as iter-55/56: even though POST /allocations/save returns 200 and the toast renders, the new pending row sometimes does not appear in the on-page list within 30s in automation (queue auto-loads via refreshKey). The card itself, the count badge, and prior-iteration runs ARE rendered correctly. Recommend adding an optimistic prepend in AllocationPendingQueue when the parent passes the just-saved doc, mirroring the AllocationRunsHistory optimisticRun pattern, OR reduce the GET round-trip latency on /api/allocations/runs?status=pending_fulfilment.

issues: recharts width(-1)/height(-1) console warnings on Overview KPI cards mount (carry-over from iter-49→56, harmless).

action_items: (Optional) AllocationPendingQueue.jsx — prepend the just-saved run optimistically (parent already has the saved doc from POST /allocations/save response) so the new row is immediately visible without waiting for the GET /allocations/runs round-trip. Same pattern AllocationRunsHistory uses with optimisticRun.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/routes/allocations.py:379-436 — save_allocation_run correctly mirrors suggested_total → allocated_total, sets status='pending_fulfilment', and copies buying_sizes → warehouse_sizes by default. Good.

/app/backend/routes/allocations.py:448-513 — fulfil_allocation_run correctly merges incoming sizes per store, recomputes warehouse_units, allocated_units, allocated_packs, sizes (legacy), delta_units; stamps audit. Idempotency guard at line 461 returns 400 if already fulfilled — exactly per spec.

/app/backend/routes/allocations.py:471 — `int(v or 0)` will raise ValueError on non-numeric strings; fastapi pydantic only types `sizes` as Dict[str, Any] so the warehouse could in theory POST {S:'abc'}. Consider tightening to Dict[str, conint(ge=0)] for safety.

/app/backend/routes/allocations.py:516-528 — list_allocation_runs accepts status filter exactly as the spec says ('pending_fulfilment'/'fulfilled'); any other value is silently ignored (returns all). Acceptable but consider HTTP 400 on invalid value for clarity.

/app/frontend/src/components/AllocationPendingQueue.jsx — clean implementation: per-run expand state, per-row size-level inputs default to buying_sizes (so 'ship as planned' is one click), live actual-total recompute, edited cells highlighted amber, Reset to plan button only when overrides exist, Confirm button disabled while saving. Variance label colour-coded. data-testid scheme aligns perfectly with the spec.
AllocationPendingQueue.jsx:32 — useEffect re-fires on `refreshKey` only (not on `onFulfilled`); after Confirm we filter the row out locally (line 89) AND parent should bump refreshKey, so safe. Good.

AllocationPendingQueue.jsx:106 — when zero pending runs, the entire section is hidden with `return null`. UX nit: on Allocations page after a fresh deploy this means Step 2 card disappears entirely, which may confuse users testing. Consider showing an empty 'No pending allocations' state for discoverability.

AllocationPendingQueue.jsx:204-208 — `buyingTotal` is shadowed inside the inner row map (declared at line 128 in the parent loop too); minor name collision but no bug — both compute the same number. Cosmetic refactor opportunity.
test_credentials.md not modified — admin login still works as documented.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — Step 1 buying card + Send to Warehouse button + Step 2 pending queue card + per-store-per-size inputs + Confirm fulfilment + Color column on Recent Allocations all rendered and wired. Only the just-saved row visibility timing was flaky in automation (the run IS persisted server-side and the queue does refresh).

seed_data_creation: 4 allocation_runs created during testing (style_name prefix Iter57_*). All deleted via mongo cleanup post-test (delete_many returned 4).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-stage workflow contract: POST /api/allocations/save → status='pending_fulfilment', rows have buying_*+warehouse_* split (warehouse_sizes mirrors buying_sizes initially); PATCH /api/allocations/runs/{id}/fulfil → flips to 'fulfilled', overwrites warehouse_sizes per store, recomputes allocated_total + delta_total, stamps fulfilled_at/by; second PATCH returns 400. GET /api/allocations/runs accepts ?status=pending_fulfilment|fulfilled (other values ignored). Frontend testids: alloc-save-run (Send to Warehouse), allocation-pending-queue (Step 2 card), alloc-pending-{run_id} (row), alloc-pending-size-{run_id}-{store}-{size} (per-cell input), alloc-pending-confirm-{run_id} (Confirm), alloc-pending-reset-{run_id} (Reset to plan). Pending queue auto-loads on mount + on refreshKey change; allow up to 8s between Save and asserting the new pending row, OR query backend directly to confirm persistence. Recent Allocations history table now has a Color column — pull thead th texts to assert. Pack table unchanged.
rca of the issue: n/a — pure feature add. Only flake is post-save UI refresh timing on the new pending queue (mirrors carry-over from iter-55/56 on the history table). Recommended remediation in action_items: optimistic prepend of the just-saved run.
